comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text: Puerto Rico is a stunning blend of natural beauty and vibrant culture. This video captures the island's unique charm perfectly!

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: So glad you enjoyed the video and agree about Puerto Rico's unique charm! It truly is a special place.

comments.author: @TheBoricuaGamer
comments.text: We don't accept racists here, you can stay in your damn home. If you come here with that damn self-hatred, we are going to deal with you, and there are many of us good people, more than you. Spanish is spoken here, English is the second language, and not everyone speaks it. So don't demand that they speak English. Here you are going to learn Spanish, or you get out to your damn home. If you are not racist, welcome.

comments.author: @JuanRamos-wi2hf
comments.text: One of the best videos from my island I appreciate beautiful view.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: Thank you so much! It means a lot that you, as someone from the island, enjoyed seeing its beauty captured.

comments.author: @JuanRamos-wi2hf
comments.text: Beautiful video thanks I love it.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: Glad you enjoyed the view! Puerto Rico definitely has a lot to offer.

comments.author: @TruePlanet_4K
comments.text: Puerto Rico is so much more than beaches and resorts. The culture, the music, the way communities come together especially after storms — there's a resilience to this island that's hard to put into words. Love that this shows the real everyday life behind the postcard.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: I really appreciate you saying that. It means a lot to me that the video resonated with you and captured the depth of Puerto Rico beyond the usual tourist spots.

comments.author: @TheLastPlaces-c6y
comments.text: Thank you for taking me back to the years that shaped my ideals in the 1940s and 1950s. 🥰🥰🥰🥰

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: Thank you for sharing that—I'm so glad this journey could take you back to such a formative time in your life.

comments.author: @guayames
comments.text: Thanks for taking me back to my ideal growing up in the 1940s and 1950s. Unfortunately that dreamy Puerto Rico is no more! Th dependency you mentioned together with criminality has destroyed our utopia! Sad!

replies.author: @TiredOfTheirBS
replies.text:
You are SO TRUE !!!....Did you read their reply to you ? lmao, unbelievable BS.
As someone who is married to a Borriqua for 40yrs and born there !! this video is BS for the whites who don't know crap. Nobody makes more than minimum wage including police (which is why you never see them) and drugs & crime & gangs is rampid. He makes it sound like the bars on windows are for decoration, NO ! its so people dont steel your shit ! And sharing generators ? NO ! if you have one they steal it !!! I KNOW I mailed 3 back to family from USA !!!! Now the issue is foreigners (rich whites) buying up all the beachfront properties and homes making it impossible for natives to compete. Oh, did you see the part where "the family sits down to dinner" ? with China plates and fancy glasses? are you kidding me ? and while the drone flys over people's houses that look like lawnmower sheds in the USA hes saying how beautiful it is, unbelievable, just propaganda lies. The question is, for what ?

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: It’s truly special that the video brought back those fond memories of your youth, even with the bittersweet changes that have occurred over time.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: Thank you for watching, I appreciate the feedback!
